name: Advanced Task Timer
summary: This Statement of Work (SOW) covers the implementation of an enhanced task time-tracking capability within Odoo that allows users to easily start and stop timers directly from...
description: This Statement of Work (SOW) covers the implementation of an enhanced task time-tracking capability within Odoo that allows users to easily start and stop timers directly from the task list view. By introducing a simple popup-based task selection and real-time timer visibility, the solution streamlines time tracking for daily work activities while keeping existing task processes unchanged. The enhancement improves accuracy, user adoption, and productivity by reducing manual effort, without affecting standard task workflows, approvals, or reporting structures already in place.

description: This app helps you control customer credit limits directly from Sales Orders in Odoo. It automatically checks available credit, prevents over-credit sales, and introduces a secure approval workflow when limits are exceeded. Managers can review and approve credit requests using a dedicated wizard, ensuring better financial control while keeping the sales process smooth and efficient.
introParagraphs: This app helps you control customer credit limits directly from Sales Orders in Odoo. It automatically checks available credit, prevents over-credit sales, and introduces a secure approval workflow when limits are exceeded. Managers can review and approve credit requests using a dedicated wizard, ensuring better financial control while keeping the sales process smooth and efficient.
This app allows you to set and manage credit limits for customers, automatically checks sales orders against available credit, and provides an approval workflow for orders exceeding the limit.
Only users assigned to the designated approval group can approve or reject credit limit requests, ensuring secure and controlled access.

introParagraphs: This CRM lead generation feature enables automatic creation of unique lead numbers by allowing users to configure a custom prefix and starting number, ensuring consistent identification such as LEAD0001. The "Transfer Lead" option allows users to quickly reassign leads to another salesperson or team member directly from the CRM pipeline.

description: Dynamic Warnings is an advanced Odoo module that allows administrators to configure and inject dynamic, customizable alert banners into any form view across the system. Alerts are triggered based on user-defined domain conditions evaluating in real-time on the client side, and can be restricted by user groups, validity dates, or company in order to control exactly when and to whom the warning is shown.
introParagraphs: Dynamic Warnings is an advanced Odoo module that allows administrators to configure and inject dynamic, customizable alert banners into any form view across the system. Alerts are triggered based on user-defined domain conditions evaluating in real-time on the client side, and can be restricted by user groups, validity dates, or company in order to control exactly when and to whom the warning is shown.

Smart Field Discovery: The system automatically detects and fetches any fields needed for your conditions, even if they are not visible on the form! This ensures your rules work perfectly on any field like amount_total , state , etc.
The Dynamic Warnings module allows administrators to create and display customizable alert banners dynamically across Odoo form views based on specific conditions.

Check Is Validation Rule if you want to prevent saving the record when conditions are met. setupSteps.body: Result Live on the Form Navigate to the app representing your Target Model (e.g., Contacts). When you open a record matching the condition natively in Odoo, the warning banner automatically injects itself right at the top of the form sheet!

setupSteps.title: Set
setupSteps.body: Date Validity If you only want an alert to run temporarily (e.g., during a holiday season or audit), fill out the Valid From and Valid To fields. The warning will automatically activate and expire precisely based on this timeframe!

setupSteps.body: User Groups Under the Restrict to User Groups field, you can limit the warning to specific Odoo user groups. Below, you can see the configuration and the result where a non-authorized user views the form and the warning remains completely hidden, keeping their UI clean!

summary: Split Extract Sales Order Odoo app allows administrators to configure and control user access to split and extract sales orders. Users can quickly select or deselect all sales...
description: Split Extract Sales Order Odoo app allows administrators to configure and control user access to split and extract sales orders. Users can quickly select or deselect all sales order lines using action buttons or manually choose specific lines. With the Split option, selected order lines are moved to a new sales order and removed from the original order, while the Extract option creates a new sales order without removing the selected lines from the existing one. The module also allows users to easily view split and extracted sales orders directly from the search panel for better tracking and management.

The module also allows users to easily view split and extracted sales orders directly from the search panel for better tracking and management.
This module allows users to split or extract selected sales order lines into new Sales Orders for better order management and operational flexibility.

This module allows you to reverse done MOs, automatically restore consumed stock, reset orders to draft, and handle multi-step manufacturing with full work order reversal â all governed by role-based access control.

This module allows you to cancel completed, in-progress, or to-close Manufacturing Orders. It automatically reverses done stock moves, cancels related pickings and work orders, and restores inventory.
When a Done Manufacturing Order is cancelled, the finished product and all consumed components are reversed in inventory, restoring your stock to its pre-production quantities.

setupSteps.body: User Group / Access Rights Go to Settings > Users & Companies > Users, activate the developer mode and check the Cancel Manufacturing Orders checkbox under Extra Rights to authorize the user.

setupSteps.title: Verify
setupSteps.body: Initial Stock Levels Check the initial stock quantity of components and the finished product in Inventory > Products before creating or running the MO.

setupSteps.title: View
setupSteps.body: Completed Manufacturing Order Open the completed (Done) Manufacturing Order. Only users with the assigned security group will see the Cancel MO action button.

setupSteps.title: Updated
setupSteps.body: Stock Levels When the Manufacturing Order is processed, finished product stock increases and consumed component stock decreases.

setupSteps.title: Cancel the
setupSteps.body: Manufacturing Order Click the Cancel MO button. The Manufacturing Order moves to the Cancelled state, and a Reset to Draft button appears.

setupSteps.title: Verify
setupSteps.body: Stock Restoration Check the inventory quantities. Consumed components are automatically restored back to stock, and the finished product stock is deducted.

setupSteps.title: Inspect
setupSteps.body: Stock Moves History Verify the product Moves History to see the automated stock reversal logs generated by the module.
